_comment: SQLite CLI binary manifest. Prebuilt archives in prebuilt-binaries/dev-tools/sqlite/.
note: sqlite3 is also available as a Python stdlib module (sqlite3) -- no install needed for Python use. This module installs only the standalone CLI binary for database inspection and administration.

linux-x64.note: Requires GLIBC >= 2.29. Not compatible with RHEL/Rocky 8.

linux-rhel8-x64.source: RHEL 8 / Rocky 8 system RPM (dnf download sqlite)
linux-rhel8-x64.note: Used on RHEL/Rocky/CentOS/AlmaLinux 8 where GLIBC 2.28 is the maximum available. Version is 3.26.0 (OS vendor package) instead of 3.53.0.
